calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: MITCHELL WONG, ESQ. specially appeared on behalf of plaintiff. DEFENDANT JOHN P SEGURA appeared on his own behalf. Pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)
